name: Montego Bags O' Wags Fruities Apple & Yoghurt  - 500g
shortDescription: Bags O’ Wags Fruities Apple & Yoghurt – 120g: Soft, chewy dog treats made with real apple and creamy yoghurt. Low in fat and sugar, ideal for rewarding and training.
description: Bags o’ Wags Fruities - Apple & Yoghurt Flavour Give your dog a treat they’ll wag for! Bags o’ Wags Fruities combine the juicy sweetness of real apple with creamy yoghurt, creating a soft, chewy snack that dogs love. Perfect for rewarding, training, or everyday indulgence, these treats are low in fat and low in sugar, so you can spoil your furry friend guilt-free. Why pet parents love it: Delicious & irresistible: Apple and yoghurt flavours with meat-based palatability enhancers make every bite a tail-wagger. Soft & chewy: Gentle on teeth, perfect for dogs of all sizes. Wholesome ingredients: Corn starch, lactose-reduced milk powder, poultry fat, fish oil, and wheat gluten provide taste plus nutritional support. Safe & fresh: Preserved with potassium sorbate for freshness and lightly coloured for visual appeal. Ingredients : Corn starch, water, glycerine, milk powder (lactose reduced), wheat gluten, sugar, poultry fat, sodium hexametaphosphate, spray-dried animal plasma, fish oil. ADDITIVES (/kg):  SENSORY: Palatability meat-based enhancers, apple flavour, yoghurt flavour, colourants. PRESERVATIVES:  Potassium sorbate. A fun fact: Apples are rich in vitamins and fibre, while yoghurt supports digestion - so every treat is both tasty and functional! Bags o’ Wags Fruities - Apple & Yoghurt: a delicious way to reward your dog, keep them happy, and support their health.
